summary: Frontend-only testing of Ike Instrumental Marching Band website. All major features tested and passing. Site is a single-page scroll app with Green/Gold color scheme.

issues: Band Director email shows placeholder text '(Placeholder – update with actual email)' which is visible to users. Should be removed or updated before going live.

action_items: Remove or update placeholder text '(Placeholder – update with actual email)' in Contact section band director email field before going live
critical_code_review_comments: Contact section shows placeholder reminder text visibly to users: '(Placeholder – update with actual email)' - this should be removed
Formspree ID is placeholder 'xvoeqkry' - expected per mocked_api notes, but should be updated with real ID before launch
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: announcement banner, sticky nav with 6 links, mobile hamburger menu (opens correctly), hero section, about stats/value tags, schedule tabs (Rehearsals/Football Games/Competitions) with Leadership Camp in Rehearsals tab, 4 band section cards, media photo gallery/video placeholders/download links, contact form with all fields + Instagram link. Nav links use CSS text-transform uppercase. Design is polished Green/Gold Swiss-brutalist style.
passed_tests: Mobile hamburger menu opens with all nav links
Hero: 'IKE INSTRUMENTAL MARCHING BAND' title + 'Rialto, California • Est. 1960' subtitle
CTA buttons: View Schedule, Media, Contact
About value tags: Discipline, Teamwork, Excellence, Community Pride
Schedule tabs: Rehearsals, Football Games, Competitions switch correctly
Leadership Camp – June 24 in Rehearsals tab
Band sections: Drumline, Brass, Woodwinds, Color Guard
Media photo gallery with solid color placeholders
3 video play buttons in Media section
Download links: Show Music, Drill Charts, Band Handbook
Contact form: Name, Email, Subject, Message fields + Send Message button
Footer has band name and school info
